name: Chicken Dijonnaise
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the bones and skin from chicken breasts and flatten into cutlets.
2. Sauté the chicken in 3 tablespoons butter until cooked on both sides. Remove from pan and keep warm.
3. Melt the remaining butter in a skillet.
4. Add onion and cook until tender.
5. Add wine, mustard, and simmer until the mixture is reduced by half.
6. Add whipping cream and simmer until the sauce is thick enough to coat a spoon.
7. Strain the sauce and add dried rosemary, thyme, and tarragon.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Pour over the chicken breasts.
